reviews.review_description:
I got a rifle stock for my Meta Quest 2 a little while back and have been looking for rifle games to use it with and I specifically wanted a game that was solely focused on utilizing a rifle/rifles, but all of the games that I've come across, have other elements to them, like running around, collecting things, taking cover, etc.

Its a wave shooter, you get unlimited ammo, but you do have to reload. There about 5 or 6 levels and they positions you in a completely safe location, allowing you to not have to worry about anything, other than aiming and shooting as well as reloading, but you don't have to watch your back, run around, etc. Which is exactly what I was looking for, but haven't found until now. The guns look good, theres a nice variety is really good and you even earn accessories as you progress, like different scopes, lasers, silencers, etc.

Some of the controls could use some fine-tuning/tweeking. When grabbing the bolt to reload, sometimes it doesn't pull all the way back, so you'll have to pull it again and you have to be very deliberate when loading the bullets/ magazines, but some people would say that's a good thing.. a few times when I let go of something, it just went flying outta nowhere

Other than that, If the little things that I mentioned get fixed, I would give this a 5 star rating.

The controls are clunky but generally work. I did not get the ak variant to load. The bolt action is weird on reload, usually have to cycle the bolt twice. Playing left handed, add left handed holster please for sidearm. Zombies get stuck and are not visible causing the waves to get stuck. Zombies take too many head shots.

That said I just sit there and keep shooting. It's got a hook for sure.

reviews.review_title: Fun game just needs a little tweaking
reviews.review_description: Absolutely love playing the game. Just needs a little tweaking.
